b0f635d7-c3bf-4709-af68-4712f0e5b2e5.name: Cleaner Bookmark Menu
b0f635d7-c3bf-4709-af68-4712f0e5b2e5.description: Remove unnecessary buttons from the toolbar bookmarks button.
b0f635d7-c3bf-4709-af68-4712f0e5b2e5.author: Pkcarreno

180d9426-a020-4bd7-98ec-63f957291119.name: TitleBarButton UI Tweaks
180d9426-a020-4bd7-98ec-63f957291119.description: Small UI tweaks to the titlebar buttons to make them more coherent with the Zen Browser design philosophy.
180d9426-a020-4bd7-98ec-63f957291119.author: DaitiDay

4ab93b88-151c-451b-a1b7-a1e0e28fa7f8.name: No Sidebar Scrollbar
4ab93b88-151c-451b-a1b7-a1e0e28fa7f8.description: This theme removes the Sidebar Scrollbar while retaining the scroll functionality.
4ab93b88-151c-451b-a1b7-a1e0e28fa7f8.author: mally8

e122b5d9-d385-4bf8-9971-e137809097d0.name: No Top Sites
e122b5d9-d385-4bf8-9971-e137809097d0.description: Annoyed with top sites that appear when you open the URL bar? With this mod, you can now hide them!
e122b5d9-d385-4bf8-9971-e137809097d0.author: Ivaon

bc25808c-a012-4c0d-ad9a-aa86be616019.name: sleek border
bc25808c-a012-4c0d-ad9a-aa86be616019.description: Sleek Zen browser borders with subtle opacity for a refined, modern look.
bc25808c-a012-4c0d-ad9a-aa86be616019.author: Lumio4u

72f8f48d-86b9-4487-acea-eb4977b18f21.name: Better CtrlTab Panel
72f8f48d-86b9-4487-acea-eb4977b18f21.description: Re-style and add customization options for the CtrlTab panel.
72f8f48d-86b9-4487-acea-eb4977b18f21.author: psu

906c6915-5677-48ff-9bfc-096a02a72379.name: Floating Status Bar
906c6915-5677-48ff-9bfc-096a02a72379.description: Mod for Zen Browser that detaches the status bar from the bottom left corner of the browser window.
906c6915-5677-48ff-9bfc-096a02a72379.author: AmirhBeigi

c01d3e22-1cee-45c1-a25e-53c0f180eea8.description: Makes unloaded tabs & folders appear ghost-like by making them grayscale and transparent.
c01d3e22-1cee-45c1-a25e-53c0f180eea8.author: Seismix

79dde383-4fe7-404a-a8e6-9be440022542.name: Tidy Popup
